# Copyright (c) 2024 The ZMK Contributors
# SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
#
# CMakeLists.txt for the led_status module.
#
# This file is included by the parent shield CMakeLists.txt (or the top-level
# shield CMakeLists.txt generated by ZMK) when CONFIG_ZMK_LED_STATUS=y.

if(CONFIG_ZMK_LED_STATUS)
    target_sources(app PRIVATE
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/led_status.c
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/led_status_behavior.c
    )

    target_include_directories(app PRIVATE
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}
    )

    # Register the DTS binding directory so Zephyr can find it
    set(ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES
        ${ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}
        PARENT_SCOPE
    )
endif()
